Section Title: Global Innovation Fund > FUND OVERVIEW
Content:
An actively managed fund seeking long-term capital appreciation in excess of the MSCI All Country World Index. The Fund invests primarily in equity securities of companies worldwide which, in the investment team's view, are drivers or beneficiaries of innovation.
Fund Highlights
High-conviction portfolio of rapidly growing, future-facing companies that are either driving innovation by disrupting existing models, or capitalising on structural growth trends
Current themes across the portfolio include areas such as machine learning, automotive evolution, and digital banking and the democratisation of financial products
The Global Innovation team closely collaborates with career industry-focused analysts on the Global Industry Research team to identify potentially attractive companies
Key Documents
Monthly Commentary (EN)
Fund Profile (EN)
Sustainability Disclosure (EN)
Factsheet (EN)
KID
Fund Video
 ... 
Section Title: Global Innovation Fund > FUND TEAM
Content:
Michael Masdea
Equity Portfolio Manager
27 years industry experience
16 years with Wellington
Michael is an equity portfolio manager and a global industry analyst on the Technology team. With a strong research background specializing in semiconductors for decades, Michael has a long history of following industries characterised by rapid change and disruption.
Brian Barbetta
Equity Portfolio Manager
17 years industry experience
12 years with Wellington
Brian is an equity portfolio manager and a global industry analyst on the Technology team. Brian’s coverage includes the Internet and video game software companies across all market caps. As portfolio manager, he manages equity assets on the behalf our clients, drawing on research from Wellington Management’s global industry analysts, equity portfolio managers and team analysts.
 ...

Qualified Investor Private Investor
The Swiss Fund Data website is aimed at people resident in Switzerland. On this website, you will find information on investment funds and other collective investment schemes authorized for public distribution in Switzerland.
The pages intended for qualified investors pursuant to Art 10.3 and of the Collective Investment Schemes Act (CISA) also contain information on investment funds and other collective investment schemes that may only be offered to such investors and may not be publicly distributed.

The information published on the Swiss Fund Data website does not constitute an offer, solicitation, or recommendation to purchase or sell any investment fund.
The fund information and documents available on the platform are provided by the respective fund providers. SIX FI further disclaims all liability for technical disruptions, interruptions of service, or for damages caused by viruses or other harmful components. Mandatory statutory liability, particularly for unlawful intent and, where applicable, gross negligence, remains reserved.
